data.revised_prompt: cinematic realistic watercolor book illustration, professional visual for a Chinese 30-minute book-summary video, quiet Kamakura and Izu Oshima atmosphere, Japanese seaside town, camellia flowers, paper letters, fountain pens, warm natural film lighting, detailed environment, emotional healing tone, soft but rich colors, storybook realism, consistent art direction across a 24-image sequence, 16:9, no readable text, no logo, no watermark. Main protagonist: one East Asian woman in her early 30s, shoulder-length black hair, soft cream cardigan, calm tired eyes. Mother: East Asian woman in her late 50s with short grey hair and muted green cardigan, clearly older than the protagonist. Daughter: teenage East Asian girl with school uniform and ponytail, clearly much younger. When a scene includes multiple people, make them different ages, different clothes, different hairstyles, different faces. Scene 18/24, story beat: Family reconciliation. Composition: warm family room at dusk, protagonist and older mother sit at opposite sides of a low table with old letters between them, their faces are visibly different ages, forgiveness begins quietly. People rule: two women only, protagonist and clearly older mother, not twins. Keep this image narratively connected to the nearby subtitle meaning, but do not draw readable words: 我们很多人都要到长大后甚至到对方离开后才慢慢看见父母或祖父母的人生他们不是天生的长辈他们也曾年轻也曾笨拙也曾在深夜里不知如何是好看见这一点并不会让过去的伤自动消失却会让心里的硬块稍微松动鸠子的成长不是变得更强势而是变得更能容纳复杂她开始明白一个人可以既伤害过你也爱过你一段感情可以没有结果却仍然真实一
